faq.q: How to enroll at VisiSekolah High School?
faq.a: Registration can be done online via the 'Apply for Admission' button on the main page or by coming directly to the Admissions Office.

faq.q: What are the requirements for new student registration?
faq.a: Main requirements include Junior High School diploma, Family Card, Birth Certificate, and recent passport photo.
